ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signal_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of signal parameters */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth of the signal in kHz */,
  "spreading_factor" INTEGER /* Spreading factor used */,
  "coding_rate" TEXT /* Coding rate applied to the signal */,
  "nominal_rb" INTEGER /* Nominal bit rate in bps */,
  "sensitivity" INTEGER /* Sensitivity indication in dBm */,
  "frequency_reference" TEXT /* Reference for the frequency used */,
  "modulation_scheme" TEXT /* Modulation scheme used (e.g., QPSK, 16-QAM) */,
  "symbol_rate" REAL /* Symbol rate in kbps */,
  "roll_off_factor" REAL /* Roll-off factor for pulse shaping */,
  "channel_bandwidth" REAL /* Channel bandwidth in kHz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the telecommunications device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., base station, router) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of device installation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device being configured */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal parameters used in the configuration */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was applied */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES signal_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, operations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., device, configuration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration */,
  "signal_quality" REAL /* Signal quality measured (0-1 scale) */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput in Mbps */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency in ms */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate (0-1 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance work done */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry standard */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Signal parameter (e.g., bandwidth, sensitivity) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry standard */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when compliance was checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES industry_standards ("standard_id")
)
